title: Eva Lantern Corp
wikitext:
[]: Eva Lantern Corp             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Mon Jun 27, 2011 4:01 pm I thought this would be a fun thread to make. Which power ring do you think would fit the most for the characters in the series. For the people are not familiar with the comics, are the Lantern Rings choices. Rage Willpower Avarice Hope Fear Compassion Death Life

[]:             Quote Post by Tarnsman » Mon Jun 27, 2011 4:10 pm Rage - Asuka Willpower - Shinji Avarice - Asuka Hope - Shinji Fear - Asuka Compassion - Shinji Death - Asuka

[]:             Quote Post by BornIn1142 » Mon Jun 27, 2011 4:24 pm That's kind of a tricky question. The lantern rings pick out true exemplars of particular emotions; only really extreme individuals quality. Blue Lanterns, for instance, seem to have an almost religious devotion to optimism. Ultimately, I don't think most of them have good matches among Eva's cast. Here's my picks for the best of the available options though: Rage: Asuka. Willpower: No one. Avarice: This really mostly refers to desire for physical property, so no one really stands out. Hope: Misato. She's the one still trying to hang on, even in EoE. Fear: Gendo. Compassion: Misato again, I suppose. Death: Um, Kaji? Anyone who's dead qualifies for a black ring. Life: I dunno.

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Mon Jun 27, 2011 4:31 pm Rage - Asuka Willpower - Kaworu Avarice - SEELE Hope - Misato Fear - Gendo? Compassion - Shinji Death - Naoko Life- Yui EDIT: Attempt to explain at least most of my choices: Rage-Asuka- I'd say it's pretty obvious from the series, though really I'd say she (and almost most of the cast) can be qualified for compassion as well. Willpower-Kaworu- He's the angel of free will. Avarice- SEELE- Greed is greed, doesn't neccesarily have to be material. SEELE wants to doom humanity to a pool of Tang to become gods or to make humanity higher then God, pretty greedy. Hope: Misato- For this I have to agree with Born's reasoning. Fear Gendo- Okay, I'm not sure anybody neccesarily merits the Yellow ring, maybe Kiel. Compassion Shinji- I'm going to say it's his desire to be close to people; will have to think about it a bit more. Also Think I might have to ponder over Death and Life more, but if you can think of anyone better just put it up here. :p

[]:             Quote Post by Trajan » Mon Jun 27, 2011 8:40 pm Rage - Asuka Willpower - Misato Avarice - Ritsuko Hope - Kaji Fear - Gendo Compassion - Kaworu Death - Rei
